name: Post Detail
description: Single-post detail view — full body, optional embedded poll, and a full toolbar of post-level actions (share, subscribe, bookmark, overflow) in the NavigationBar trailing cluster. Reader's primary action is to scroll, react, or vote; replies live on the paired `post-comments` recipe.

top.note: page variant — leading back chevron, wordmark 'blind' muted in the title position (not a screen title — wordmark), trailing `button/toolbar` cluster.

items.title: Switching to Meta — pros and cons
items.body: Long-form body. Numbered list and inline links to entities (Meta is rendered as a tokenized entity link). Hashtags like #TC render in accent blue.

body.note: Single-post body modeled as a one-item feed. The author block has two meta lines: 'channel · time', then 'workplace · role · username' — preserve both. Title at `sys.typo.display.md`; inline entity links and hashtag color are tokenized text styles, not arbitrary inline overrides.

poll.note: Poll options inside a `banner`-shaped container with a leading coral Poll icon, 'Number Participants' header, and 'Select only one answer' helper. The banner surface is implicit in the poll region's chrome.

props.body: You cannot reply to flagged/deleted comment.

notice.note: Persistent informational notice strip at the bottom of the scroll. Non-modal — do not model as a `toast`.

rules: Preserve both meta lines on the author block (channel·time, then workplace·role·username). Collapsing into one loses identity context that is load-bearing in Blind.
The bottom notice strip is non-modal and persistent for this state — model as `banner`, not `toast`.
'blind' wordmark in the nav title is muted and not a screen title — do not promote it to `sys.color.onSurface`.
Inline entity underlines and hashtag color are tokenized text styles, not arbitrary `<span>` overrides.
